title: Kemmons Wilson Hospitality Partners and Ascendant Capital Partners Joint Venture Completes Acquisition of Sotherly Hotels Inc.
author: Globe Newswire
description: A joint venture between Kemmons Wilson Hospitality Partners (KWHP) and Ascendant Capital Partners has successfully completed the acquisition of Sotherly Hotels Inc. for $2.25 per share in cash. The deal, approved by Sotherly stockholders on January 22, 2026, expands the acquirers' hospitality portfolios in Southeastern U.S. markets. Schulte Hospitality Group will assume operations of Sotherly's 10 full-service hotels, with Apollo Global Management providing debt financing.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The acquisition at $2.25 per share was approved by stockholders and completed successfully. While this represents an exit for public shareholders, the deal was unanimously recommended by the board and special committee, indicating fair valuation and orderly transition.

title: Sotherly Hotels Inc. Stockholders Approve Merger Transaction
author: Na
description: Sotherly Hotels Inc. stockholders approved a merger with KW Kingfisher LLC, a joint venture led by Kemmons Wilson Hospitality Partners and Ascendant Capital Partners. Shareholders will receive $2.25 per share in cash, with the transaction expected to close in Q1 2026. This represents the highest premium paid for a public REIT in the past five years.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is being acquired at $2.25 per share, described as the highest premium paid for a public REIT in the past five years, representing a favorable outcome for shareholders. The merger has received stockholder approval and is expected to close in Q1 2026.

title: Sotherly Hotels Inc. Announces Deferral of Payment of Preferred Dividends
author: Sotherly Hotels Inc.
description: Sotherly Hotels Inc. announced it is deferring preferred stock dividend payments and suspending future preferred stock dividends. The company is being acquired by a joint venture backed by Kemmons Wilson Hospitality Partners and Ascendant Capital Partners for $2.25 per share in cash.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is suspending dividend payments, which typically signals financial challenges, and is being acquired, suggesting potential strategic or financial difficulties

title: This $2.25-A-Share Deal Just Sent Sotherly Hotels Stock Soaring Over 140%
author: Akanksha Bakshi
description: Sotherly Hotels agreed to be acquired by a joint venture led by Kemmons Wilson Hospitality Partners for $2.25 per share, representing a 153% premium to its recent stock price. The deal is expected to close in Q1 2026 with financing from Apollo Global Management and Ascendant Capital Partners.

title: Sotherly Hotels Inc. to be Acquired by Joint Venture Backed by Kemmons Wilson Hospitality Partners and Ascendant Capital Partners
author: Globe Newswire
description: Sotherly Hotels Inc. will be acquired by a joint venture led by Kemmons Wilson Hospitality Partners and Ascendant Capital Partners for $2.25 per share in cash, representing a 152.7% premium to its recent share price. The transaction is expected to close in Q1 2026.
